text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 124 

GAP_MONPP_COINS_2M 

LABEL: Gap Coinsurance Split Network Standard Mail Order — Two-Month Supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a two-month supply of the drugs 
on this tier, using a mail order non-preferred pharmacy (MONPP; also known as a standard mail order 
pharmacy within a split network) during the coverage gap
